decision.title: Tutor Tore Apart the Progress Report
decision.body: Feedback just dropped on the progress report. The tutor isn't impressed, noting a lack of ambition, unclear scope, and 'Unclear attribution of features'. Everyone has read it.

options.text: Hold a group meeting to address every point together.
Quietly rescope and adjust without making a big deal of it.
Reassure everyone it's fine and push on as planned.
